reviews.review_description: I was very excited to play this game but I can't move the character with my joysticks he just runs in the corner and that's it, can control him, I changed my controller batteries, did a restart, and a reboot as well. Bummer, no refund either. Unless you want to donate your money, I'd suggest finding another game. This one doesn't work
Just like Jazzz review. Liked it but now it won’t get passed load screen. Don’t ask for load screen shot it’s just the Unity logo at start up.
